component.name: Wordpipe
component.summary: Wayland GNOME dictation with streaming ASR

description.p: Wordpipe is a GNOME-oriented dictation app that streams speech recognition into the focused text field through desktop portals.
It uses local Parakeet/Nemotron ONNX models and supports selectable model profiles for faster or smaller local inference.
Initial local Flatpak packaging metadata for the Wordpipe MVP.
